title: My Simple Claude Cowork System (for normal people)
summary: Claude Cowork is a workspace architecture that transforms Claude into an AI operating system for daily work. It uses a three-level hierarchy of workstations and projects, persistent memory, and CLAUDE.md instruction files to enable personalized automation for tasks like email management, expense tracking, and content drafting.
